revision.text: {{{1}}} Use '''{{hilite | text | color (optional) }}''' to set the background color of some text to yellow (or optional color). ''Note: Only use this sparingly and for talk pages!''

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#if:{{#time:U|{{{3}}}}} - {{#time:U|now}} > 0|{{hilite/core}}|}}|{{hilite/core}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> Use '''<tt><nowiki>{{hilite | text | color (optional) }}</nowiki></tt>''' to set the background color of some text to yellow (or optional color). ''Note: Only use this sparingly and for talk pages!''</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#if:{{#time:U|{{{3}}}}} - {{#time:U|now}} > 0|{{hilite/core|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}|}}|{{hilite/core|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> Use '''<tt><nowiki>{{hilite | text | color (optional) }}</nowiki></tt>''' to set the background color of some text to yellow (or optional color). ''Note: Only use this sparingly and for talk pages!''</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#ifexpr:({{#time:U|{{{3}}}}} - {{#time:U|now}}) > 0|{{hilite/core|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}|}}|{{hilite/core|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> Use '''<tt><nowiki>{{hilite | text | color (optional) }}</nowiki></tt>''' to set the background color of some text to yellow (or optional color). ''Note: Only use this sparingly and for talk pages!''</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#ifexpr:({{#time:U|{{{3}}}}} - {{#time:U|now}}) > 0|{{hilite/core|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|yellow}}}}}|}}|{{hilite/core|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|yellow}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> Use '''<tt><nowiki>{{hilite | text | color (optional) }}</nowiki></tt>''' to set the background color of some text to yellow (or optional color). ''Note: Only use this sparingly and for talk pages!''</noinclude>

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#ifexpr:({{#time:U|{{{3}}}}} - {{#time:U|now}}) > 0|{{hilite/core|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|yellow}}}}}|}}|{{hilite/core|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|yellow}}}}}}} Use '''{{hilite | text | color (optional) | expiration (optional) }}''' to set the background color of some text to yellow (or optional color).
''Note: Only use this sparingly and for talk pages!''

revision.comment: Changed protection level for "[[Template:Highlight]]": [[WP:HIGHRISK|high-risk]] template with 2000+ transclusions ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#ifexpr:({{#time:U|{{{3}}}}} - {{#time:U|now}}) > 0|{{highlight/core|{{{1|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{2|}}}||yellow|{{{2}}}}}}}|{{{1|}}}}}|{{highlight/core|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|yellow}}}}}}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

{{{1}}} Use '''{{hilite | text | color (optional) }}''' to set the background color of some text to yellow (or optional color). ''Note: Only use this sparingly and for talk pages!''

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
